# GlassPick

GlassPick is an open-source, provably fair weighted giveaway picker.
It commits draw inputs before a future drand Quicknet round exists and produces a JSON record that can be independently verified.

## Canonical resources

- Source and proof specification: https://github.com/jishnuteegala/glasspick
- Privacy notice when deployed: https://jishnuteegala.com/privacy
- License: MIT

## Product facts

- No accounts, analytics, advertising, payments, or hosted user-generated content.
- Entrant lists and draw records are processed locally in the browser.
- Functional local storage preserves pending draws across refreshes.
- Browser requests to the public drand Quicknet relays provide randomness.
- Direct X integration is self-hosted and requires the operator's own server-side X API key.
